assertions.assertion: Output defines ApiScope entries for at least 'read' and 'write'
assertions.rationale: Defines 'catalog.read', 'catalog.write', 'orders.read' instead of generic 'read' and 'write' as asked

assertions.assertion: Output defines an ApiResource with name 'catalog-api' that includes both 'read' and 'write' in its Scopes collection
assertions.rationale: Does not define any ApiResource objects at all

assertions.assertion: Output defines an ApiResource with name 'orders-api' that includes 'read' in its Scopes collection but not 'write'
assertions.rationale: Does not define any ApiResource objects

assertions.assertion: Output calls AddInMemoryApiResources to register the API resources with IdentityServer
assertions.rationale: Does not call AddInMemoryApiResources at all, only uses AddInMemoryApiScopes
